meta.title: Farm El Baya - Direct Farm Stay in Testour, Tunisia
meta.description: Private-room permaculture farm stay one hour from Tunis. Breakfast included, olive trees, animals, movement sessions, and direct booking from 180 DT/night.

hero.headline:
Farm stays under
the olive trees.
hero.subhead: Three private rooms on a 40-acre permaculture farm in Testour, one hour from Tunis. Breakfast is included every morning.

quote: Get lost on purpose. The best places aren't always on the map.

pillars.title: The rooms
pillars.text: Three private rooms with private bathrooms, quiet mornings, and direct rates from 180 DT per night.

pillars.title: The table
pillars.text: Breakfast from the farm's eggs, olive oil, yogurt, and seasonal fruit. Lunch and dinner on request - Tunisian home cooking by Mahdi's mother.

pillars.title: The land
pillars.text: 40 acres of olive trees, pomegranates, fig trees, almonds, beehives, animals, trails, rooftop stargazing, Mouvement Research, and a kids playground area.

reviews.heading: Guests leave grounded.
reviews.subhead: Public reviews mention the food, calm, hospitality, and the feeling of being welcomed into real farm life.

items.quote: You can see that everything on the farm is made with love and purpose. You feel good and relaxed there. The food that you get there is the best food you will get in Tunisia.
items.name: Helmi

items.quote: Leaving the farm I feel grounded, nourished, and inspired. The time I spent here was immersive. I was provided with more food than I could eat.
items.name: Mariah

items.quote: I wanted to stay only one night but stayed for two. To be honest, I wanted to stay a whole week.
items.name: Lorenzo

items.quote: Un coup de coeur et un coup de foudre. Quand simplicite rime avec authenticite, hospitalite et generosite.
items.name: Souhir

items.quote: Combining organic farming, sports, and personal development is simply fantastic. You can feel that it is his passion that drives him.
items.name: Romeo

forge.label: COMING THIS SUMMER
forge.heading: Forge.
forge.text: A separate seven-day men's retreat on this land. Physical work. Cold mornings. Honest conversation.
